Champions | County | Runner-up | County | Score | Ref
North Walsham (EBA) | Norfolk | Gerrards Cross | Bucks | 3–2 |
Aldershot Traction Athletic | Hants | Romford | Essex | 3–2 |
Kings Torquay | Devon | Royal Wootton Bassett | Wilts | 4–1 |
Kings Torquay | Devon | Norfolk BC | Norfolk | 3–2 |
Kings Torquay | Devon | Gerrards Cross | Bucks | 4–1 | [[3]](#cite_note-KBC-3)

infobox.key: 2020 No competition due to [COVID-19 pandemic](/wiki/COVID-19_pandemic "COVID-19 pandemic")

infobox.value: Gerrards Cross | Bucks | Avenue, Coventry | Warks | 3–2 | [[9]](#cite_note-9)

is one of the men's team events at the annual [Bowls England National Championships](/wiki/Bowls_England_National_Championships "Bowls England National Championships").[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) Kings BC, arguably the leading team in England have won the event four years running and the team includes [Louis Ridout](/wiki/Louis_Ridout "Louis Ridout"), [Jamie Chestney](/wiki/Jamie_Chestney "Jamie Chestney") and [Sam Tolchard](/wiki/Sam_Tolchard "Sam Tolchard").[[3]](#cite_note-KBC-3)
["Plans for 2020 in Response to Coronavirus Outbreak"](https://www.bowlsengland.com/plans-for-2020-season-in-response-to-coronavirus-outbreak/). Bowls England.

["2023 National Championships men's top club"](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSSTnC3u26P6J57_m1Wmv4PzQpJQdm7Xs15WNmhnd39r_w5uUDwuUB_FeHL2n9GmtGSym2DXr7FsaLd/pubhtml). Bowls England. Retrieved 27 August 2023.

["2024 National Championships men's top club"](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/u/0/d/1e7-HcoYtj6ELQHL0V3cafMYcpwKCg4LaDmh27LyfYbs/pubhtml?gid=0&single=true&pli=1). Bowls England. Retrieved 27 August 2023.

| * [v](/wiki/Template:BowlsEnglandNationalChampionships "Template:BowlsEnglandNationalChampionships") * [t](/w/index.php?title=Template_talk:BowlsEnglandNationalChampionships&action=edit&redlink=1 "Template talk:BowlsEnglandNationalChampionships (page does not exist)") * [e](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Template:BowlsEnglandNationalChampionships "Special:EditPage/Template:BowlsEnglandNationalChampionships") | | |

The **top club** is one of the men's team events at the annual [Bowls England National Championships](/wiki/Bowls_England_National_Championships "Bowls England National Championships").[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) Kings BC, arguably the leading team in England have won the event four years running and the team includes [Louis Ridout](/wiki/Louis_Ridout "Louis Ridout"), [Jamie Chestney](/wiki/Jamie_Chestney "Jamie Chestney") and [Sam Tolchard](/wiki/Sam_Tolchard "Sam Tolchard").[[3]](#cite_note-KBC-3)
